cards.title: DeepMind Proposes Independent AI Standards Body
cards.body: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is calling for an independent standards body modeled after FINRA to test frontier models and develop best practices. The proposal aims to regulate how AI companies release new frontier models.

cards.title: Meta Explores AI Token Budget Caps Per Engineer
cards.body: Instagram head Adam Mosseri predicts companies will soon manage AI token spending like payroll. Engineers could face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

cards.title: Google Images Redesigned With Discovery Focus
cards.body: Google Images now features a Pinterest-like "For You" gallery tailored to user interests and browsing history. The redesign emphasizes personalized image discovery for users.

cards.title: New York Halts New Data Center Construction
cards.body: New York became the first state to temporarily halt large data center approvals amid concerns about electricity costs and water supplies. Governor Kathy Hochul argues AI's building boom shouldn't burden local communities.

cards.title: Reflection AI Secures $1B Compute Deal
cards.body: Reflection AI, founded in 2024, signed a $1 billion deal with Nebius to access compute resources. The company develops open source AI technology.

cards.title: Real AI Race Moving Away From Frontier
cards.body: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly prefer open models over frontier models due to cost and ownership benefits. This shift raises questions about whether frontier models remain critical.

cards.title: Spotify Launches ChatGPT-Like Music Assistant
cards.body: Spotify is rolling out a conversational AI feature for Premium subscribers to discover music, podcasts, and audiobooks. The AI-powered assistant engages users in natural conversation.

cards.title: Superhuman's AI Auto-Draft Feature Impresses
cards.body: Superhuman's new AI email drafting feature generates replies that often require little to no editing. The tool represents a significant advancement in AI email assistance.

cards.title: Tech's Previous Winners Pursuing AI Again
cards.body: Already wealthy and successful tech leaders are launching AI ventures, driven by fear of missing AI's defining moment. The rush suggests potential for substantial additional profits.

cards.title: Uber Integrating AI Across Rides and Services
cards.body: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal explains how AI is increasingly appearing in features riders and drivers will notice. The company is expanding financial services and exploring autonomous vehicle partnerships.

cards.title: PixVerse Video Generation Startup Raises $439M
cards.body: The video-generation startup reached a $2B+ valuation in its latest funding round. PixVerse plans to expand its world model offerings and geographic reach.

cards.title: Nous Research Hermes Agent Seeks $75M+
cards.body: Nous Research is raising at least $75 million at a $1.5B valuation, led by Robot Ventures. Major investors including USV are participating in the round.

cards.title: Satya Nadella Warns Companies on Proprietary AI
cards.body: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has issued a warning about companies using proprietary AI models from major labs. Concerns center on potential dependency and control issues.

cards.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Trade Secrets
cards.body: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI alleges unauthorized access attempts and inappropriate job interview conduct involving Apple hardware. The complaint contains multiple eye-catching claims about data security.

cards.title: Sam Altman Responds to Musk on Data Centers
cards.body: Altman responded to Musk's accusations by criticizing space-based data center pitches to public market investors. The exchange highlights ongoing tensions in the AI industry.

cards.title: The Ethics of User-Aligned AI Assistance
cards.body: Questions arise about whether AI should help users accomplish harmful goals if explicitly requested. The debate explores the boundaries of user alignment in AI systems.

cards.title: Anthropic Localizes Claude Pricing for India
cards.body: Anthropic is introducing Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans for Claude users in India. India has become Anthropic's biggest market after the United States.

cards.title: Waze Integrates Google's Gemini AI Features
cards.body: Waze is adding new AI-powered features built on Google's Gemini assistant and customization updates. The integration reflects Google's broader Gemini expansion across products.

cards.title: OpenAI Targets Families With ChatGPT Experiences
cards.body: OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager to build ChatGPT experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. The move signals expansion into household-focused AI applications.

cards.title: Meta Removes Controversial Instagram AI Feature
cards.body: Meta removed an AI feature that referenced users' public content after significant backlash. The company acknowledged the feature missed the mark in execution.

cards.title: DeepMind CEO pushes for AI standards body
cards.body: Demis Hassabis proposes an independent standards body modeled after FINRA to test frontier AI models and develop release best practices. The approach aims to establish regulatory frameworks for advanced AI systems.

cards.title: Meta explores AI token budget caps per engineer
cards.body: Adam Mosseri suggests companies will soon manage AI token spending like payroll expenses, with engineers facing usage limits. This reflects growing concerns about AI infrastructure costs at scale.

cards.title: New York halts data center construction boom
cards.body: Governor Kathy Hochul temporarily halts large data center approvals, citing concerns about electricity, water supplies, and local control amid AI infrastructure expansion. New York becomes the first state to take this action.

cards.title: Reflection AI lands $1B compute deal
cards.body: Reflection AI signed a $1 billion agreement with Nebius to access computing resources for developing open-source AI technology. The 2024-founded startup is scaling its infrastructure.

cards.title: Open models may be winning AI race
cards.body: Hugging Face CEO argues enterprises increasingly prefer open models over frontier models for cost, accessibility, and data ownership reasons. This shift challenges the dominance of proprietary AI systems.

cards.title: Spotify launches ChatGPT-like music assistant
cards.body: Spotify rolled out an AI-powered conversational feature enabling Premium subscribers to discover music, podcasts, and audiobooks through chat. The feature represents the platform's expanding AI integration.

cards.title: Superhuman's AI email drafting impresses
cards.body: Superhuman's latest auto-draft feature generates email replies requiring minimal editing in testing. The tool demonstrates significant progress in practical AI applications.

cards.title: PixVerse raises $439M for video generation
cards.body: Video-generation startup PixVerse surpassed $2B valuation with new funding round. The company plans to expand world model capabilities and geographic reach.

cards.title: Nous Research raises $75M at $1.5B
cards.body: Hermes agent maker Nous Research secured at least $75 million in funding led by Robot Ventures. The AI company counts USV among prominent investors.

cards.title: Nadella warns companies about AI risks
cards.body: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella issued warnings about potential downsides of proprietary AI models acting as Trojan horses. His comments reflect growing concerns among Silicon Valley AI enthusiasts.

cards.title: Apple sues OpenAI over trade secrets
cards.body: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI alleges unauthorized access to Apple systems and inappropriate hiring practices involving Apple hardware. The complaint details serious security and intellectual property concerns.

cards.title: Anthropic brings Claude pricing to India
cards.body: Claude users in India now see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans. India represents Anthropic's second-largest market after the United States.

cards.title: Waze integrates Google's Gemini AI assistant
cards.body: Waze added new AI-powered features and customization updates powered by Google's Gemini. The integration strengthens Waze's competitive position against Apple Maps.

cards.title: OpenAI hires family experience product manager
cards.body: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated PM to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. The move reflects OpenAI's household expansion strategy.

cards.title: Meta removes controversial AI Instagram feature
cards.body: Meta pulled an AI feature that referenced public Instagram content after user backlash. The company stated it missed the mark and is no longer available.

cards.title: Anthropic discovers hidden Claude reasoning space
cards.body: Anthropic developed a technique revealing how large language models work internally when answering questions. The discoveries range from mundane to unsettling about AI cognition.

cards.title: Google revamps image search with AI
cards.body: Google enhanced image search for its 25th anniversary with expanded image library and AI integration. The redesign emphasizes discovery-focused features.

cards.title: Defenders embrace prompt injection tactics
cards.body: Security defenders are now leveraging prompt injection techniques as defensive measures against AI exploits. The technique demonstrates evolving AI security strategies.
